arts.ttl: Ex-Barcelona manager Luis Enrique’s scathing opinion of Xavi Hernandez’s side revealed in documentary
arts.sum: Former treble-winning Barcelona manager Luis Enrique was full of praise for his former teammate Xavi Hernandez when the pair met in the Champions League last season. Yet the current Paris Saint-Germain boss revealed his true thoughts behind closed doors, as was seen in a documentary about him ‘You’ve no f***ing clue.’ The ex-Spain manager divides […] The post Ex-Barcelona manager Luis Enrique’s scathing opinion of Xavi Hernandez’s side revealed in documentary appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Szczesny set for Barca medical after agreeing one-year deal
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny is reportedly heading to Barcelona for a medical after agreeing to come out of retirement and join the Catalans on a one-year deal. Fabrizio Romano has given the transfer the ‘here we go’ treatment already and added that Szczesny will undergo a medical in Spain later this week.

arts.ttl: Szczesny gives the green light to Barcelona move: all the contract details
arts.sum: According to Polish journalist Tomasz Wlodarczyk from Meczyki, the 34-year-old goalkeeper is set to undergo a medical exam at Barça this Thursday . It remains unclear whether Szczesny, who left Juventus on a free transfer, will need to pay a fee to the Bianconeri for his return to professional football.

arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczesny 'agrees to join Barcelona' as the former Arsenal goalkeeper 'comes out of retirement' to cover for injured Marc-Andre ter Stegen
arts.sum: Polish shot-stopper Wojciech Szczesny is set to join Barcelona as an emergency replacement goalkeeper after coming to an agreement with the European giants, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Barcelona agree free agent goalkeeper signing
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Wednesday sewn up an agreement to add to the club’s ranks between the posts. The player primed to link up with Hansi Flick’s squad…

arts.ttl: Barcelona interested in signing Premier League star as successor for Robert Lewandowski
arts.sum: Barcelona have started to look at life after Robert Lewandowski. The Polish striker may still be one of the most prolific goalscorers in Europe, but he is now 36, meaning that his days at the top level will soon be coming to an end. arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'agree deal' for Ter Stegen replacement
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly have a deal in place to sign former Juventus goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny on a free transfer for the rest of the 2024-25 campaign.
